torch_pattern:
x = attn_out[:, :, :num_heads, :]
out = x.reshape(seq_len, 1, batch, num_heads * head_dim)
applicability_notes: torch_pattern_source: test comment: Input (1, 32, 32(8), 128) [seq, batch, padded_heads(real_heads), head_dim] -> Output (1, 1, 32, 1024) [seqlen, 1, batch, hidden_size]; padded heads beyond num_heads are sliced away, then heads*head_dim are flattened contiguously per batch (a pure reshape after the slice); constraints: {'mode': 'decode (seq_len == 1)', 'input_rank': 4, 'input_shape': '[seq=1, batch={BATCH}, padded_heads>= {N_LOCAL_HEADS}, head_dim={HEAD_DIM}]', 'output_shape': '[1, 1, {BATCH}, {N_LOCAL_HEADS}*{HEAD_DIM}]', 'notes': 'Inverse of nlp_create_qkv_heads_decode; typically follows SDPA/batched-MM scores output and precedes the attention output projection (wo / o_proj) linear.'}

placement_observations.size_descriptor: decode activation, shape [1, batch=32, padded_heads=32, head_dim=128]

memory_config.shard_spec_template: {shape: [{PADDED_NUM_HEADS}, {HEAD_DIM}], grid: one core per batch row (SCORES_BATCHED_MM_OUTPUT_MEMCFG)}

placement_observations.size_descriptor: decode attention output per device group, [1, batch_size_per_device_group, padded_heads, head_dim]
placement_observations.source: model call site: attn_output_11BH = ttnn.to_memory_config(attn_output_1G4D, model_config['SCORES_BATCHED_MM_OUTPUT_MEMCFG'](batch_size_per_device_group)) immediately before nlp_concat_heads_decode

memory_config.shard_spec_template: op-default L1 sharded; re-sharded to ATTN_ALL_GATHER_MATMUL_OUTPUT_MEMCFG when fused all-gather-matmul path is taken

condition.var: use_fused_all_gather_matmul or prefetcher is not None

placement_observations.source: model call site: attn_output_cat = ttnn.to_memory_config(attn_output_cat, model_config['ATTN_ALL_GATHER_MATMUL_OUTPUT_MEMCFG']) guarded by use_fused_all_gather_matmul/prefetcher

placement_observations.size_descriptor: decode activation [1, 1, batch, hidden_size], consumed by output projection linear
placement_observations.source: model call site: tt_out = ttnn.linear(tt_sdpa_out, weights.o_proj, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, memory_config=ttnn.L1_WIDTH_SHARDED_MEMORY_CONFIG)
model call site: sub_core_grids=self.prefetcher.all_worker_cores_range_set if self.prefetcher is not None else None
